title: CloudVector Payload Schema (v0.1.0) - cloud_observation_v1
description: Normalized cloud audit-log observation. One record per cloud API call (AWS CloudTrail, Azure Monitor Activity Log, GCP Cloud Audit Log). Carries the nine-channel behavioral content used by downstream entity-behavior analytics: the original six channels (activity_rate, peer_diversity, burstiness, entropy, novelty, reversal_rate) plus three cloud-specific channels (data_volume, error_rate, privilege_escalation_rate).

event_type.description: Record type discriminator. Pinned to cloud_observation_v1 for this schema version.

timestamp.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of the cloud API event (UTC). Sourced from CloudTrail eventTime, Azure eventTimestamp, or GCP timestamp.

object_id.description: Stable identifier for the calling principal (mirrors metadata.content.entity_id). Format prefix indicates provider: 'iam:' for AWS IAM ARNs, 'az:' for Azure callers, 'gcp:' for GCP principal emails.

event_id.description: Provider-native event identifier (CloudTrail eventID, Azure eventDataId, GCP insertId). May be empty if the source omitted it.

source.description: Logical sensor identifier set by the plugin caller (e.g. 'aws-prod-account-123').

content.description: Nine-channel behavioral content + cloud context. Field naming is shared across CloudTrail, Azure Monitor, and GCP Audit parsers so downstream analytics is provider-agnostic.

entity_id.description: Calling principal. AWS: 'iam:<arn>' or 'iam:<type>:<account>'. Azure: 'az:<caller>'. GCP: 'gcp:<principalEmail>'. Used by activity_rate, peer_diversity, burstiness, novelty, reversal_rate, data_volume, error_rate, and privilege_escalation_rate channels.

peer_id.description: Resource the principal acted on. AWS: resource ARN if present, else '<eventSource>/<inferredKey>'. Azure: resourceId. GCP: protoPayload.resourceName. Used by peer_diversity and novelty channels.

domain.description: Fixed domain tag. Always 'cloud' for this record type.

amount.description: Activity-rate count. Always 1 for one-event-one-record emission.

inter_arrival_ms.description: Milliseconds since this entity_id's previous observation in this stream. 0 for the first observation. Drives the burstiness channel.

property_bucket.description: Coarse action bucket: '<service>:<action_class>'. action_class is one of read, mutate, destroy, auth, other. Drives the entropy channel.

novelty_token.description: 'first' the first time (entity_id, peer_id) is observed in this stream, 'seen' thereafter. Drives the novelty channel.

direction_token.description: Action direction. Read for Get/List/Describe/Head/BatchGet/Select/etc. (configurable via read_ops). Write otherwise. Drives the reversal_rate channel.

data_volume_bytes.description: Bytes transferred for this event. AWS: sum of bytesTransferredIn/Out, objectSize, contentLength. GCP: response.size. Azure: 0 (not extracted in v0.1.0). Drives the data_volume channel (cloud-specific).

error_bucket.description: 'error' if the API call failed (CloudTrail errorCode/errorMessage present, Azure resultType in {Failure, Failed, Error}, GCP status.code != 0), 'ok' otherwise. Drives the error_rate channel (cloud-specific).

escalation_token.description: 'escalate' if event_name (or methodName) is in the configured privilege-escalation list, 'normal' otherwise. Drives the privilege_escalation_rate channel (cloud-specific).

cloud_provider.description: Source cloud provider. Set by the parser, not by configuration.

account_id.description: Cloud-provider account identifier. AWS: recipientAccountId or userIdentity.accountId. Azure: subscriptionId. GCP: project_id. Empty string if unavailable.

region.description: Cloud-provider region/location string. AWS: awsRegion. Azure: location/resourceLocation. GCP: resource.labels.location. Empty string if unavailable.

event_name.description: Provider-native event name (CloudTrail eventName, Azure operationName tail segment, GCP methodName tail segment).

event_source.description: Provider-native event source (CloudTrail eventSource, e.g. 's3.amazonaws.com'; Azure: literal 'azure.monitor'; GCP: protoPayload.serviceName).

source_ip.description: Caller IP address as reported by the provider. May be empty.

user_agent.description: Caller user-agent string as reported by the provider. May be empty.

user_type.description: Provider-native principal type (CloudTrail userIdentity.type, Azure identity scope, GCP principalSubject). May be empty.

error_code.description: Provider-native error code if the call failed; empty string otherwise.

error_message.description: Provider-native error message if the call failed; empty string otherwise.

sensor_id.description: Logical sensor identifier supplied to the parser by the caller. Mirrors metadata.source.

session_id.description: Optional session/correlation identifier supplied to the parser by the caller. Empty string if not set.
